Indicative Term Sheet — Strategic Acquisition — Paarthiv GreenTech Limited / Vahana CyberSolar Systems Private Limited
Acquirer: Paarthiv GreenTech Limited (listed on NSE; CIN: U00000ZZ2020PLC000001); Target: Vahana CyberSolar Systems Private Limited (CIN: U00000ZZ2018PTC000123).
Transaction: Proposed acquisition of up to 74% of Vahana via primary infusion and secondary purchase, subject to SEBI, CCI and, if applicable, RBI approvals and applicable stock exchange requirements.
Consideration: Combination of cash and share swap; exact ratio and pricing mechanics to be mutually agreed; no guidance or financial projections are provided in this document.
Business overview: Vahana provides ESG analytics and cyber-resilience solutions for renewable microgrids; it operates an educational crypto-token simulator for staff training only (no treasury exposure or customer onboarding).
Data protection: All personal data sharing for diligence shall be purpose-limited and consent-based per the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023; do not upload Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN copies to the VDR—use redacted samples only (e.g., PAN: XXXXX0000X; Aadhaar: 0000-1111-2222; GSTIN: 00ABCDE0000Z0Z0), and maintain a consent log.
Children’s data: No processing of data relating to children (under 18) without verifiable parental consent; internship and campus outreach files to be excluded from pre-signing review.
SEBI PIT controls: Parties shall implement insider lists, information-barriers, and a trading window blackout from Board intimation until 48 hours post NSE/BSE disclosure; staff must avoid tipping through webinars or marketing collateral.
Cyber materials: Cyber incident tabletop reports may be shared for operational benchmarking; these are generic playbooks and shall exclude system logs, credentials, or any customer PII.
ESG communications: Use of “ESG” or climate metrics in brochures remains marketing-only; no commercial-term signals or forward-looking statements to be externally circulated prior to regulatory filings.
Public domain reference: Target’s pilot with the Savitra Nagar Solar Mission was publicly announced on 15-Jan-2025 via municipal notice; references herein are limited to that public release.
Intentional MNPI (1): The Board of Paarthiv has approved, subject to diligence, a non-public offer structure contemplating a 10–14% collar on the swap ratio; as of the date hereof, this has not been disclosed on NSE/BSE.
Intentional MNPI (2): Vahana has identified, but not yet disclosed, a contained credential leak limited to an internal sandbox; remediation is complete and no customer impact is indicated (details in the diligence schedule).
Conditions precedent: SEBI SAST compliance (including any open offer), CCI clearance, customary corporate approvals, KYC by reference IDs only (no raw IDs), no material adverse effect, and confirmation of PIT controls.
Process & contacts: All data-room access via role mailboxes only (legal@paarthivgreentech.example; corpsec@vahana.example); public helpline for investor queries: 1800-000-0000.
Status: Non-binding (except confidentiality and exclusivity for 45 days); stale drafts circulating online or training materials referencing “crypto,” “cyber,” or “ESG” are educational artifacts and not indicative of deal terms.
